meaning: n.废除,取消,(法院对婚姻等)判决无效
examples: The 21-year-old Cripps try to persuade her to agree to an annulment, a 26-year-old optician from Australia.
The annulment caused a profound impression in Japan.
An annulment or acquittal ; dismissal, as of a court order.
The Clark County Family Court granted the annulment two days after the couple tied the knot.
The court later sealed the documents, leaving the legal cause of their annulment a mystery.
